features.name: module input port with unpacked array dimensions
features.description: Code should include a module input port declared with unpacked array dimensions using the [1:2] syntax (2-element unpacked array)

features.name: queue-style array literal assignment to unpacked array input
features.description: Code should include a queue-style array literal assignment using single-quote syntax to an unpacked array input port

features.name: module instantiation with unpacked array port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an unpacked array wire is connected to a module port that has unpacked dimensions

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
